title: Transportation Research at Morgan: From Research to Advocacy — D-RED Seminar Slides (Chavis)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-11-12 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Transportation Research at Morgan: From Research to Advocacy' presented by Celeste Chavis, PhD. Companion deck to form_dred_2025_11_jeihani_ntc_smarter (NTC and SMARTER Center). Walks through translating transportation research into policy advocacy and community impact.
